retention_period_days.description: Number of days of history that must be retained.

identity.description: Identity used by DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_identity).

type.description: Type of identity to use for the DatasetConfig. Possible values are: `IDENTITY_TYPE_PER_CONFIG`, `IDENTITY_TYPE_PER_PROJECT`.

dataset_config_id.description: The user-defined ID of the DatasetConfig

organization_number.description: Organization resource ID that the source projects should belong to. Projects that do not belong to the provided organization are not considered when creating the dataset.

include_newly_created_buckets.description: If set to true, the request includes all the newly created buckets in the dataset that meet the inclusion and exclusion rules.

description.description: An optional user-provided description for the dataset configuration with a maximum length of 256 characters.

source_projects.description: Defines the options for providing source projects for the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_source_projects).

project_numbers.description: The list of project numbers to include in the DatasetConfig.

source_folders.description: Defines the options for providing source folders for the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_source_folders).

folder_numbers.description: The list of folder numbers to include in the DatasetConfig.

organization_scope.description: Defines the options for providing a source organization for the DatasetConfig.

include_cloud_storage_locations.description: Defines the options for including cloud storage locations for the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_include_cloud_storage_locations).

locations.description: The list of cloud storage locations to include in the DatasetConfig.

exclude_cloud_storage_locations.description: Defines the options for excluding cloud storage locations for the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_exclude_cloud_storage_locations).

locations.description: The list of cloud storage locations to exclude in the DatasetConfig.

include_cloud_storage_buckets.description: Defines the options for including cloud storage buckets for the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_include_cloud_storage_buckets).

cloud_storage_buckets.description: The list of cloud storage buckets/bucket prefix regexes to include in the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_include_cloud_storage_buckets_cloud_storage_buckets).

exclude_cloud_storage_buckets.description: Defined the options for excluding cloud storage buckets for the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_exclude_cloud_storage_buckets).

cloud_storage_buckets.description: The list of cloud storage buckets/bucket prefix regexes to exclude in the DatasetConfig. Structure is [documented below](#nested_exclude_cloud_storage_buckets_cloud_storage_buckets).

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

link_dataset.description: Setting this field to true while creation will automatically link the created dataset as an additional functionality. -> **Note** A dataset config resource can only be destroyed once it is unlinked, so users must set this field to false to unlink the dataset and destroy the dataset config resource.

bucket_name.description: The list of cloud storage bucket names to exclude in the DatasetConfig. Exactly one of the bucket_name and bucket_prefix_regex should be specified.

bucket_prefix_regex.description: The list of regex patterns for bucket names matching the regex. Regex should follow the syntax specified in google/re2 on GitHub. Exactly one of the bucket_name and bucket_prefix_regex should be specified.
